mapper.insert: insert into order0(detail, status, f_id, room, number, last_time) values (#{detail}, #{status}, #{f_id}, #{room}, #{number}, #{lastTime})
mapper.update: update order0 set evaluation=#{evaluation} where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select id, detail, status, f_id, room, number, last_time, evaluation from order0
select id, detail, status, f_id, room, number, last_time, evaluation from order0 where status='已处理'
select id, detail, status, f_id, room, number, last_time, evaluation from order0 where status='未处理'
select count(*)>0 from order0 where id=#{id}
